title: Ubiquiti LBE-5AC-XR - UISP LiteBeam AC 5 GHz XR
category: Ubiquiti LBE-5AC-XR - UISP LiteBeam AC 5 GHz XR
description: LiteBeam 5AC-XR is a 2Ã2 MIMO AC series client station with airMAX TDMA for the 5GHz band. This unit has a higher antenna gain of 29 dBi and a GPS module for time synchronization which is useful when building links over longer distances distance. The unit reaches a transmission speed of up to 867 Mbps on the wireless part, with a channel width of 80 MHz and is compatible only with other airMAX AC products .
